aRecipes.sHint: Pointer/String conversion (Unicode compiler) - check the direction; see the Unicode refactor family.

Ambiguous return value (a Get_ / function call) used in an expression - assign it to a typed local first, then use the local. If no such call is on this line, it's inside a macro/command (fix at the definition).
Duplicate global definition - remove or rename the later one.
Reserved name (FMAC macro iEntry/iExit/iValidate) used as a local - rename it (e.g. iExitCode).
Wrong number of arguments - check the function/procedure signature.
Function not legal at runtime / has moved - check the owning package.
Undefined symbol - a missing DB field/table, or a source typo (check the table/field spelling). A source/schema fix, not an automated refactor.
Obsolete command - see the message for the specific command and its modern replacement.
Obsolete package - replace with the suggested modern class (e.g. dftable.pkg -> cCJGrid/cCJDbGrid).
Obsolete class - replace with the modern equivalent.

Obsolete class: List - it still compiles and runs. Replace by hand when reworking the view (usually a one-column cCJGrid): the Add_Item fill and Current_Item/Value reads need a datasource redesign. No auto-fix (rare + semantic migration).
Not Unicode-safe (OEM/ANSI) - see the message. ToOEM/ToANSI auto-rewrite; other _Oem/_Ansi calls are manual.
Changes legacy Calc/MoveInt/MoveStr/MoveNum/MoveReal -> 'Move' command.
Replaces legacy GetAddress command with function AddressOf.
Changes legacy Insert command to use the function Insert.
Adds the default '.pkg' file extension to a Use statement that lacks one.
Changes legacy Left command with Left.
Modernises a legacy global Indicator declaration to a Boolean global variable. DataFlex
Changes legacy 'Indicate' to expression
Changes legacy 'Indicate' to expression
Changes usage of the legacy Length command with function Length.
Changes the obsolete Decr command to the modern Decrement command.
Changes the obsolete Incr command to the modern Increment command.
Changes the obsolete Sub command to the modern Subtract command.
Comments out the obsolete Get_Argument_Size / Set_Argument_Size commands (legacy string-buffer
Comments out the obsolete Get_Argument_Size / Set_Argument_Size commands (legacy string-buffer
Changes legacy Mid command with function Mid.
Changes usage of legacy Pos command with function Pos.
Changes legacy Replace command with function Replace.
Changes legacy Right command with function Right
Changes legacy Character command with function Character.
Changes legacy Pad command with function Pad.
Converts legacy Begin_Constraints / End_Constraints blocks into a modern OnConstrain procedure.
Converts legacy Begin_Constraints / End_Constraints blocks into a modern OnConstrain procedure.
Migrates legacy 'Object ... is a dfTimer' objects to the modern cTimer: swaps the class, drops
Changes legacy square brackets found indicators; [Found] [FindErr] to expressions; (Found) or (Not(Found))
Defines the bare 'Select' macro indicator left behind when ChangeLegacyIndicators /
Changes legacy Sysdate4 command to Sysdate command.
Changes lecacy Trim command with function Trim.
Changes legacy Uppercase command to the Uppercase function.
Changes legacy Lowercase command to the Lowercase function.
Changes legacy ZeroString command with function ZeroString.
Removes 'Private' keyword from Property declaration lines.
Removes 'Public' property members from property declaration lines.
Refactors legacy DbGrid objects to a CJ grid class with individual column objects.
Refactors legacy non-data-aware Grid objects to a CJ grid class.
Refactors legacy dbList selection lists to cDbCJGridPromptList prompt lists.
Unicode fix for compile error 4539: wraps the source of a bare
Unicode fix for compile error 4539 (String -> Pointer direction): rewrites a
Unicode fix for the legacy OEM/ANSI string-conversion calls: rewrites
Unicode fix for the legacy OEM/ANSI string-conversion calls: rewrites
Reports Only! Makes no changes to the source code.
Reports Only! Makes no changes to the source code.
